title: Tables
description: For tabular data — never for layout.

questions.prompt: Which element wraps a HEADER row's cells?
questions.explanation: Header cells are <th>. Group them inside <thead> for semantics.

options: Adds an image below the table
Provides an accessible title/description for the table
questions.explanation: <caption> is the accessible title of the table. Screen readers announce it.

questions.prompt: Which attribute makes a cell span 2 columns?
